businessCard.title: My Community Card
businessCard.subtitle: Showcase your personal information and contact details
businessCard.scanQrCode: Please scan the QR code with WeChat to share
businessCard.copySuccess: Card link has been copied to clipboard
businessCard.uploadHint: Support JPG, PNG format, recommended size 750×1334px
businessCard.dropImage: Click or drag image here to upload

businessDocs.title: Business Docs
businessDocs.subtitle: Project overview, API modules, deployment flow, environment variables, security, FAQ, changelog and contributing guide

overview.title: Project Info
overview.descriptionValue: iHui AI Community - Professional AI tool integration platform (Monorepo: website + WeChat mini program)

auth.title: Auth Module
auth.desc: Account registration, login, third-party login, JWT tokens, device binding and MFA

payment.title: Payment Module
payment.desc: WeChat / Alipay / UnionPay multi-channel payment + order creation + async notification + sync callback

ai.title: AI Module
ai.desc: AI chat, image generation, video generation, model management, agent orchestration

user.title: User Module
user.desc: User profile, settings, VIP levels, wallet, orders, messages

admin.title: Admin Console
admin.desc: Admin console (users, roles, menus, dictionaries, monitoring)

env.title: Environment Variables
env.desc: Copy .env.example to .env.production and fill in actual values

build.title: Type Check + Build
build.desc: npm run build:typecheck (includes vue-tsc + vite build)

production.title: Deploy to Production
production.desc: nginx copy dist/ directory + configure CSP + enable HTTPS + start backend

environment.title: Environment Variables
environment.note: These variables must be written to .env.production and injected by Vite at build time; access at runtime via import.meta.env

vars.viteEnableMonitor: Whether to enable frontend monitoring reporting (true/false)
vars.viteUseVize: Whether to enable Vize compilation optimization

csp.title: CSP
csp.desc: Inject unified source declaration via meta + sync to nginx; report violations to /api/csp-report

hmac.title: HMAC Signature
hmac.desc: All write APIs use DeviceService to generate device_id + requestSignature (HMAC-SHA256)

webhook.title: Webhook Signature
webhook.desc: Payment callbacks + Webhooks use webhookSignature module for verification + anti-replay + idempotent ID

session.title: Session Management
session.desc: Token encrypted storage via StorageManager + LoginDuration expiry detection

rbac.title: RBAC Permissions
rbac.desc: Frontend useAuthStore + backend RBAC; sensitive pages guarded by requiresAuth + requiresAdmin

xss.title: XSS Protection
xss.desc: vue-i18n default escape + safeHtml directive whitelist + DOMPurify secondary filtering

browser.q: Which browsers does the project support?
browser.a: Supports Chrome 90+, Firefox 88+, Safari 14+, Edge 90+. IE is not supported. PWA features require a browser that supports Service Worker.

language.a: Click the language switcher in the top navigation bar. Supports 5 languages: Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, English, Japanese, Korean.

demo.a: Add ?demo=true parameter to the URL, or set VITE_DEMO_MODE=true in .env. In demo mode, network errors will automatically fall back to mock data.

deploy.a: Please refer to the "Deployment" Tab: 1) npm run build:typecheck 2) Copy dist/ to nginx 3) Configure HTTPS + CSP 4) Start backend service.

contribute.a: Please refer to the "Contributing" Tab: Fork repository → Create branch → Submit PR. Code must pass typecheck + lint + tests.

techStack.q: What tech stack does the project use?
techStack.a: Vue 3 + TypeScript + Vite + Element Plus + Pinia + Vue Router + vue-i18n + Playwright + Vitest.

bug.a: Submit a bug report in GitHub Issues. Please include: reproduction steps, browser version, console error logs, screenshots.

pwa.a: Offline access, Background Sync, Push notifications, Share Target, install to desktop.

v110: PWA enhancement: Background Sync + Push notifications + Web Share Target
Performance optimization: vue-office chunk split into 5 sub-modules
i18n completion: all language coverage reached 100%
Documentation enhancement: FAQ + CHANGELOG + CONTRIBUTING Tab
v100: PWA basic features (offline cache + install to desktop)
Component showcase page (/storybook) + business docs page (/business-docs)
Performance budget check + i18n coverage check

contributing.title: Contributing Guide
contributing.note: Contributions are welcome! Please follow the steps above to submit a PR. Code must pass typecheck + lint + tests.

fork.title: Fork Repository
fork.desc: Fork the project to your account on GitHub

dev.title: Develop + Test
dev.desc: npm run dev to start dev server; npm run test:unit to run unit tests

check.title: Code Check
check.desc: npm run typecheck + npm run lint to ensure code quality

commit.title: Commit Code
commit.desc: git commit -m "feat: describe your changes" (follow Conventional Commits)

push.title: Push + PR
push.desc: git push origin feature/your-feature-name → Create Pull Request on GitHub
